name: Amhari- Shero Wat (Ethiopian Dry Peas Bowl)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the peas in tap water for 20 minutes.
2. Peel the onions and cut into small cubes. Peel and mash the garlic.
3. Heat the oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
4. Add the ginger, pepper, salt, and 2 cups water. Stir well, cover, and bring to boil.
5. When the water boils, add the peas and the rest of the water. Cook for 40 minutes on a medium-low flame.
6. Serve hot.
